changes: Loyalty credits can now be applied to maintenance invoices — apply a free visit directly from the invoice detail page
Invoice detail page shows a loyalty panel with hours earned, running balance, and a progress bar
Invoice PDF shows a Loyalty Reward line in the totals block when a credit has been applied, and adapts the loyalty note to reflect whether the visit was redeemed, banked, or still being built up
Settings → Business Targets: loyalty credit value (ex. VAT) is now configurable
Fixed: invoice PDF download was failing and leaving the button stuck — now recovers cleanly if anything goes wrong
Fixed: labour rows on invoice PDF now show the correct visit date
Settings → App: new 'What's New' button to review recent patch notes any time
Fixed: invoice visit order — visits on multi-visit invoices now always appear in date order
Fixed: employee can now be changed when editing a work log entry
Fixed: duplicate date field no longer appears when creating a scheduled job
Fixed: loyalty points now correctly adjust when editing or deleting work log entries
Fixed: deleting a work log now reverses the loyalty hours that were credited for it
Fixed: customers on exempt rate cards no longer see a loyalty section on their invoice
Invoice PDF: labour lines now show the visit date only — employee names are internal
Loyalty points toggle added to customer form — on by default, turn it off for customers who shouldn't earn points. Affects both point accumulation and the loyalty section on their invoices
Removed misleading 'discount applied to rates' note from job totals

Fixed: standing discount was being applied twice — once to the hourly rate, then again to the invoice subtotal. It now only applies to the subtotal, so line-item rates show the true rate and the discount is a clean deduction
Fixed: custom hourly rate set on a customer is now actually used when logging hours (was being ignored)
Fixed: county dropdown showing blank when editing a customer — was caused by a case mismatch between stored value and the dropdown list
Fixed: county validation errors now show inline on the field and scroll to it, rather than appearing as a generic message at the bottom
Settings menu now animates closed (was snapping shut instantly)
Patch notes backfilled for v1.9.3 through v1.9.6 — you may see a catch-up summary
VAT Calculator added — accessible from the sidebar (desktop) and avatar menu (mobile)
Settings menu now closes when tapping a bottom nav tab
Removed redundant 'ex-VAT' labels — VAT is always added on top unless stated
Fixed currency fields not formatting on blur when pasting values like 37.3507
Currency fields now round to 2 decimal places on blur across the whole app
Invoice and receipt PDF filenames updated to INV-LL-… and REC-LL-… format
Custom hourly rate per customer — set a fixed rate that overrides the standard, shown as a pill on the customer page
Payroll moved into Office section — no longer a separate nav item
Office cards redesigned: compact horizontal layout with number beside icon
Office order: Payroll, Invoices, Leads, Contacts
Employee management: add and edit employees with pay rates and PPSN
My Hours: field staff can now view their logged work history
App updates and version info moved to Settings → App tab
Rate cards: maintenance rate now shown as its own card
Patch notes: you'll see what changed after every update
